com.hp.workpath.api.supplies.supplyinfo

Enum Supply.ConsumableStateAction

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Enum<Supply.ConsumableStateAction>
      • com.hp.workpath.api.supplies.supplyinfo.Supply.ConsumableStateAction
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Comparable<Supply.ConsumableStateAction>
    Enclosing class:
    Supply
    Deprecated. 
    API 8 "Deprecated due to change in scope of supply data. Supply data are currently only managed by the 9 selected APIs:
    • Supply.getConsumableTypeEnum()
    • Supply.getMakeAndModel()
    • Supply.getProductNumber()
    • Supply.getSerialNumber()
    • Supply.getDescription()
    • Supply.getMarkerColor()
    • Supply.getApproxPercentRemaining()
    • Supply.Capacity.getMaxCapacity()
    • Supply.Capacity.getUnit()
    "

    @Deprecated
public static enum Supply.ConsumableStateAction
extends java.lang.Enum<Supply.ConsumableStateAction>
    Enums of ConsumableStateAction
    Since:
    API 5

    • Enum Constant Summary

      Enum Constants

      Deprecated.

    • Enum Constant Detail

      • ACKNOWLEDGE

        @Deprecated
 @SerializedName
public static final Supply.ConsumableStateAction ACKNOWLEDGE
        Deprecated. API 8 "No longer use ACKNOWLEDGE."
        The device's action will be to acknowledge the pen state e.g. newGenuineHP. This state is exclusive with continue or stop actions and cannot exist in the list of supported actions together for a pen state.
        Since:
        API 5

      • NONE

        @Deprecated
 @SerializedName
public static final Supply.ConsumableStateAction NONE
        Deprecated. API 8 "No longer use NONE."
        No specific action is required in this consumable state.
        Since:
        API 5

      • STOP

        @Deprecated
 @SerializedName
public static final Supply.ConsumableStateAction STOP
        Deprecated. API 8 "No longer use STOP."
        The device's action will be stop when in the specific consumable state.
        Since:
        API 5

      • CONTINUE

        @Deprecated
 @SerializedName
public static final Supply.ConsumableStateAction CONTINUE
        Deprecated. API 8 "No longer use CONTINUE."
        The device's action will be to continue when in the specific consumable state.

      • CONTINUECOUNTERFEIT

        @Deprecated
 @SerializedName
public static final Supply.ConsumableStateAction CONTINUECOUNTERFEIT
        Deprecated. API 8 "No longer use CONTINUECOUNTERFEIT."
        The device's action will be to continue with the counterfeit cartridge that was sold to user as new genuine HP cartridge.

      • CONTINUEINBLACK

        @Deprecated
 @SerializedName
public static final Supply.ConsumableStateAction CONTINUEINBLACK
        Deprecated. API 8 "No longer use CONTINUEINBLACK."
        The device's action will be to continue printing in black only when in the specific consumable state.

    • Method Detail

      • values

        public static Supply.ConsumableStateAction[] values()
        Deprecated. 
        Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared. This method may be used to iterate over the constants as follows: 
        for (Supply.ConsumableStateAction c : Supply.ConsumableStateAction.values())
    System.out.println(c);
        Returns:
        an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared

      • valueOf

        public static Supply.ConsumableStateAction valueOf(java.lang.String name)
        Deprecated. 
        Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this type. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
        Returns:
        the enum constant with the specified name
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if this enum type has no constant with the specified name
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if the argument is null
